author: Attila KISBENEDEK
title: Volodymyr Zelensky called the strike 'final proof that Russia definitely does not want peace' | National | tylerpaper.com
text: Volodymyr Zelensky called the strike 'final proof that Russia definitely does not want peace' - Attila KISBENEDEK - Updated Tags As featured on Russian President Vladimir Putin said Thursday that the conflict in Ukraine had characteristics of a "global" war and did not rule out strikes on Western countries.
